meaning: n.<拉>撒丁岛(意大利在地中海的一个岛),撒丁区(意大利一自治区)
examples: He'll be visiting four cities including Cagliari in Sardinia.
This sighting occurred during my dive to a sunken wreck off Sardinia.
The article 'Sardinia, land and sea' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet Traveller.
Italy has coal in Sardinia, but it lacks the technological base to do the Sasol trick.
